functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { // // Either set or clear the WDENINT bit to that will determine whether the // watchdog will generate a reset signal or an interrupt signal. Take care // not to write a 1 to WDOVERRIDE. // if(mode == SYSCTL_WD_MODE_INTERRUPT) { HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_SCSR) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_SCSR) & ~SYSCTL_SCSR_WDOVERRIDE) | SYSCTL_SCSR_WDENINT); } else { HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_SCSR) &= (uint16_t)(~(SYSCTL_SCSR_WDENINT | SYSCTL_SCSR_WDOVERRIDE)); } }
{ // // If the status bit is cleared, the WDINTn signal is active. // return((HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_SCSR) & SYSCTL_SCSR_WDINTS) == 0U); }
{ // // Set the disable bit. // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCR) |= SYSCTL_WD_CHKBITS | SYSCTL_WDCR_WDDIS; // // Poll until WD sync busy is cleared // SysCtl_pollSyncBusyWd(SYSCTL_SYNCBUSYWD_WDCR); }

{ // // Clear the disable bit. // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCR) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCR) & ~SYSCTL_WDCR_WDDIS) | SYSCTL_WD_CHKBITS); // // Poll until WD sync busy is cleared // SysCtl_pollSyncBusyWd(SYSCTL_SYNCBUSYWD_WDCR); }
{ // // Enable the counter to be reset and then reset it. // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDKEY) = SYSCTL_WD_ENRSTKEY; HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDKEY) = SYSCTL_WD_RSTKEY; }
{ // // Enable the counter to be reset // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDKEY) = SYSCTL_WD_ENRSTKEY; }
{ // // Reset the watchdog counter // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDKEY) = SYSCTL_WD_RSTKEY; }

{ uint16_t regVal; regVal = (uint16_t)predivider | SYSCTL_WD_CHKBITS; // // Write the predivider to the appropriate register. // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCR) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCR) & ~(SYSCTL_WDCR_WDPRECLKDIV_M)) | regVal); // // Poll until WD sync busy is cleared // SysCtl_pollSyncBusyWd(SYSCTL_SYNCBUSYWD_WDCR); }

{ uint16_t regVal; regVal = (uint16_t)prescaler | (uint16_t)SYSCTL_WD_CHKBITS; // // Write the prescaler to the appropriate register. // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCR) = (uint16_t)((HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCR) & ~(SYSCTL_WDCR_WDPS_M)) | regVal); // // Poll until WD sync busy is cleared // SysCtl_pollSyncBusyWd(SYSCTL_SYNCBUSYWD_WDCR); }
{ // // Read and return the value of the watchdog counter. // return(HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDCNTR)); }
{ // // Read and return the status of the watchdog reset status flag. // return((HWREGH(CPUSYS_BASE + SYSCTL_O_RESC) & SYSCTL_RESC_WDRSN) != 0U); }
{ // // Clear the watchdog reset status flag. // HWREGH(CPUSYS_BASE + SYSCTL_O_RESCCLR) = SYSCTL_RESCCLR_WDRSN; }

{ // // Clear the windowed value // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDWCR) &= (uint16_t)(~SYSCTL_WDWCR_MIN_M); // // Set the windowed value // HWREGH(WD_BASE + SYSCTL_O_WDWCR) |= (value & SYSCTL_WDWCR_MIN_M); }
